changelog:
First versioned release of the 9M2IBR fork (single board: ESP32_9M2IBR_E22_400M22S, ESP32-D + Ebyte E22-400M22S/SX1268).

## Highlights
- Repository baseline set to V1.00; README rewritten to document the actual codebase, with an ongoing Changelog.
- Trimmed to the one board this fork targets; CI updated accordingly.
- Full codebase bug-fix sweep, including a Web Admin auth bypass, a null-pointer crash on `/action`, an unbounded APRS-IS connect loop that could hang boot forever, two stored-XSS holes in the Web UI, and several other correctness fixes (see README Changelog for the full list).
- Software-identifier strings sent over APRS-IS/syslog rebranded from CA2RXU to 9M2IBR (original author copyright/credit retained per GPLv3).
- Added a browser-based Web Flasher published to a public GitHub Pages site: https://g-03355699-tech.github.io/9M2IBR-lora-igate-web-flasher/installer.html

See README.md → Changelog for the complete, itemized history.
